system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Multi-asset cal request — 6 instruments, on-site, ISO 17025 / A2LA", "body": "Dear Customer,

Thank you for your request. We have logged your on-site calibration requirements for all six instruments at your Hsinchu Foundry-4 metrology bay, with ISO/IEC 17025 certification and A2LA traceability, including as-found data.

The following work orders have been created:

- WO-3-10851 — KS-UXR-441288 (UXR0334A Real-Time Scope)
- WO-3-65392 — KS-PNAX-330917 (PNA-X N5247B 67 GHz VNA)
- WO-3-46421 — KS-MXA-882103 (MXA N9020B Signal Analyzer)
- WO-3-38221 — KS-VXG-118822 (VXG M9384B Vector Sig Gen)
- WO-3-23396 — KS-BERT-998811 (M8040A 64 GBaud BERT)
- WO-3-59797 — KS-SMU-771044 (B2902B Precision SMU)

These work orders are logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA. Our scheduling team will then coordinate with you to confirm an on-site visit date that minimizes downtime, consolidating all six calibrations into a single visit as requested.

If you have a preferred completion date, PO reference, or contract reference to associate with these work orders, please share it at your convenience.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.subject: Re: Multi-asset cal request — 6 instruments, on-site, ISO 17025 / A2LA
parsed.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for your request. We have logged your on-site calibration requirements for all six instruments at your Hsinchu Foundry-4 metrology bay, with ISO/IEC 17025 certification and A2LA traceability, including as-found data.

The following work orders have been created:

- WO-3-10851 — KS-UXR-441288 (UXR0334A Real-Time Scope)
- WO-3-65392 — KS-PNAX-330917 (PNA-X N5247B 67 GHz VNA)
- WO-3-46421 — KS-MXA-882103 (MXA N9020B Signal Analyzer)
- WO-3-38221 — KS-VXG-118822 (VXG M9384B Vector Sig Gen)
- WO-3-23396 — KS-BERT-998811 (M8040A 64 GBaud BERT)
- WO-3-59797 — KS-SMU-771044 (B2902B Precision SMU)

These work orders are logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA. Our scheduling team will then coordinate with you to confirm an on-site visit date that minimizes downtime, consolidating all six calibrations into a single visit as requested.

If you have a preferred completion date, PO reference, or contract reference to associate with these work orders, please share it at your convenience.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
